Class ConfigurationWatcherConfigurationProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.kubernetes.configuration.watcher.ConfigurationWatcherConfigurationProperties
@ConfigurationProperties("spring.cloud.kubernetes.configuration.watcher") public class ConfigurationWatcherConfigurationProperties extends Object

Ryan Baxter

    • CONFIG_MAP_APPS_ANNOTATION

      @Deprecated(forRemoval=true) public static final String CONFIG_MAP_APPS_ANNOTATION
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      annotation name to enable refresh/restart for specific apps when using configmaps.
      See Also:
